Found in task.json description as the required filter target for the competitor company

Code analysis of setup_task.sh and data/visitor_records.csv shows no records for Nexus Industries, Sarah Lee, or Tom Borg are ever injected or present. The registration function is defined but unused in setup_task.sh.

Code analysis of data/visitor_records.csv shows the actual available negative samples are names like James Smith and Maria Garcia. The claimed names are fabricated and completely absent from the dataset.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires filtering for Nexus Industries and exporting the results to /home/ga/Documents/nexus_audit.csv (or .pdf/.txt). However, analysis of the environment scripts and provided datasets (visitor_records.csv) reveals that no records for Nexus Industries, Sarah Lee, or Tom Borg are ever populated or injected into the application. The task is fundamentally unsolvable because the target data is missing. The positive and negative samples defined in the metadata are completely fabricated and contradicted by the actual available data.
